name: Passionflower Extract Standardized
summary: Standardized passionflower extract has limited human evidence for modest sleep/anxiety benefit.
description: Passiflora incarnata extract standardized for flavonoids (e.g., vitexin/related) with CNS-relevant modulation of inhibitory tone, informing sleep/anxiety research framing.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: sedative medications or alcohol or benzodiazepines or opioids due to additive CNS depression
MAOI medications due to theoretical monoamine oxidase inhibitory activity from trace beta-carboline alkaloids
anesthesia or perioperative sedative medications due to additive CNS-depressant effect
